Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 The graph of enriched profunctors

 Suppose that we have an enriched profunctor `E₁ ↛e E₂`. Its graph is defined to be the
 following category
 - objects consist of `x : E₁`, `y : E₂` and `f : P y x`
 - morphisms from `(x₁ , y₁ , f₁)` to `(x₂ , y₂ , f₂)` are given by morphisms `g : x₁ --> x₂`
   and `h : y₁ --> y₂` making a diagram commute.
 We define this category as a 2-sided displayed category. In addition, we construct an
 enrichment for this category. To do so, we need to assume that the category `V` over which
 we enriched, has binary products and equalizers (in the formalization, we assume that `V`
 is a Benabou cosmos for convenience). Binary products in `V` are used to construct enriching
 objects that have pairs of morphisms in `E₁` and in `E₂`, and we use equalizers to express
 the commutativity requirement.

 Content
 1. The graph of an enriched profunctor
 2. Accessors and builders for objects and morphisms
 3. The enriched hom object
 4. Operations for the enrichment
 5. Laws for the enrichment
 6. The enrichment for the graph
 7. The first projection
 8. The second projection
 9. The square of the graph

 ******************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.BenabouCosmos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.Profunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.ProfunctorSquares.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Profunctors.StandardProfunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Closed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Total.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Import MonoidalNotations.

#[local] Opaque sym_mon_braiding.

Section GraphOfEnrichedProfunctor.
  Context {V : benabou_cosmos}
          {C₁ C₂ : category}
          {E₁ : enrichment C₁ V}
          {E₂ : enrichment C₂ V}
          (P : E₁ ↛e E₂).

  (** * 1. The graph of an enriched profunctor *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor C₂ C₁

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor C₂ C₁

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
C₂ → C₁ → UU
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ D : C₂ → C₁ → UU,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
 D x₁ y₁
 → D x₂ y₂ → C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧ → C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧ → UU) ?pr1

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
C₂ → C₁ → UU
 exact (λ x y, I_{V} --> P x y).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ D : C₂ → C₁ → UU,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ : C₂) (y₁ y₂ : C₁),
 D x₁ y₁
 → D x₂ y₂ → C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧ → C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧ → UU)
  (λ (x : C₂) (y : C₁), V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧)
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ h₁ h₂ f g,
             h₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f
             =
             h₁ · rmap_e_arr P g x₁).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_id_comp
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_id_comp
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

C₁, C₂: category

twosided_disp_cat_id

twosided_disp_cat_comp
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_id
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
xy: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
  x y
xy · lmap_e_arr P y (identity x) =
xy · rmap_e_arr P (identity y) x

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
xy: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
  x y
xy · identity (P x y) = xy · identity (P x y)

      apply idpath.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_comp
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ (f₁ · f₂) =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P (g₁ · g₂) x₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₃ · (lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₁) =
xy₁ · (rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₂ · (rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₁) =
xy₁ · (rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₂ · (lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁) =
xy₁ · (rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₂
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₁
xy₁: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₁ y₁ ⟧
xy₂: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₂ y₂ ⟧
xy₃: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x₃ y₃ ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f₂: C₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
g₁: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
p: xy₂ · lmap_e_arr P y₂ f₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁
q: xy₃ · lmap_e_arr P y₃ f₂ =
xy₂ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₂
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁ =
xy₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₁ x₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ x₁

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor C₂ C₁,
 twosided_disp_cat_id_comp D) ?pr1

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

 exact graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor C₂ C₁,
 twosided_disp_cat_id_comp D)
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 exact graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_id_comp.
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data y₁ x₁
xy₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data y₂ x₂
fg, fg': xy₁ -->[ g ][ f] xy₂
fg = fg'

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
y₁, y₂: C₂
g: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
xy₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data y₁ x₁
xy₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data y₂ x₂
fg, fg': xy₁ -->[ g ][ f] xy₂
fg = fg'

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

xy₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data x₂ y₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
isaset (xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

xy₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data x₂ y₂

g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
isaprop (xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
xy₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data x₁ y₁
xy₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data x₂ y₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
isProofIrrelevant (xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₂
y₁, y₂: C₁
xy₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data x₁ y₁
xy₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data x₂ y₂
f: C₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
x, y: xy₁ -->[ f ][ g] xy₂
x = y

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

twosided_disp_cat_data C₂ C₁
V: benabou_cosmos

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_data C₂ C₁,
 twosided_disp_cat_axioms D) ?pr1

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
twosided_disp_cat_data C₂ C₁
 exact graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_data C₂ C₁,
 twosided_disp_cat_axioms D)
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_data
 exact graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat_axioms.
  Defined.

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, x': C₂
y, y': C₁
p: x = x'
q: y = y'
f: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat x y
g: graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat x' y'
isweq (idtoiso_twosided_disp p q)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
isweq (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath x) (idpath y))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y) f g → f = g
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
isaprop (f = g)

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧

  (iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
     (identity_z_iso y) f g)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
h: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y) f g
f = g

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
h: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y) f g
p:= pr1 h: g · lmap_e_arr P y (identity x) =
f · rmap_e_arr P (identity y) x
f = g

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
h: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y) f g
p: g · identity (P x y) = f · identity (P x y)
f = g

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
h: iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
  (identity_z_iso y) f g
p: g = f
f = g

      exact (!p).

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
isaprop (f = g)
 apply homset_property.

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂

  (iso_twosided_disp (identity_z_iso x)
     (identity_z_iso y) f g)
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
isPredicate
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)))
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
∏
x0 y0 : f -->[ identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] g,
is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) x0
→ is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
    (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) y0 → x0 = y0

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
isPredicate
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)))
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
x0: f -->[ identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] g
isaprop
  (is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
     (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) x0)

        apply isaprop_is_iso_twosided_disp.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
∏
x0 y0 : f -->[ identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] g,
is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) x0
→ is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
    (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) y0 → x0 = y0
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₂
y: C₁
f, g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
x0, y0: f -->[ identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] g
X: is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) x0
X0: is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) y0
x0 = y0

        apply isaprop_graph_enriched_profunctor_disp_mor.
  Qed.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor
    : category
    := total_twosided_disp_category
         graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat.

H₂: is_univalent C₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
H₁: is_univalent C₁
H₂: is_univalent C₂
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat
  graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat
 exact is_univalent_graph_enriched_profunctor_twosided_disp_cat.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. Accessors and builders for objects and morphisms *)
  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
    : UU
    := graph_enriched_profunctor.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1
             (xyf : graph_enriched_profunctor)
    : C₂
    := pr1 xyf.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2
             (xyf : graph_enriched_profunctor)
    : C₁
    := pr12 xyf.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor
             (xyf : graph_enriched_profunctor)
    : I_{V}
      -->
      P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf)
    := pr22 xyf.

  Definition make_graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
             (y : C₂)
             (x : C₁)
             (f : I_{V} --> P y x)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
    := y ,, x ,, f.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_mor
             (xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob)
    : UU
    := xyf₁ --> xyf₂.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1
             {xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob}
             (f : graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁
      -->
      graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂
    := pr1 f.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2
             {xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob}
             (f : graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁
      -->
      graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂
    := pr12 f.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
f: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 f) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 f)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
f: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 f) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 f)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)

    exact (pr22 f).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
f, g: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂
r₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 f =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 g
r₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 f =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 g
f = g

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
f, g: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂
r₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 f =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 g
r₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 f =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 g
f = g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
f₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
p: pr22 xyf₁ -->[ f₁ ][ f₂] pr22 xyf₂
g: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂
r₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 (f₁,, f₂,, p) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 g
r₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 (f₁,, f₂,, p) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 g
f₁,, f₂,, p = g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
f₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
p: pr22 xyf₁ -->[ f₁ ][ f₂] pr22 xyf₂
g₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
q: pr22 xyf₁ -->[ g₁ ][ g₂] pr22 xyf₂
r₁: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 (f₁,, f₂,, p) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 (g₁,, g₂,, q)
r₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 (f₁,, f₂,, p) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 (g₁,, g₂,, q)
f₁,, f₂,, p = g₁,, g₂,, q

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: ∑ (x : C₂) (y : C₁), V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
p: pr22 xyf₂ · lmap_e_arr P (pr12 xyf₂) f₁ =
pr22 xyf₁ · rmap_e_arr P f₂ (pr1 xyf₁)
g₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
g₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
q: pr22 xyf₂ · lmap_e_arr P (pr12 xyf₂) g₁ =
pr22 xyf₁ · rmap_e_arr P g₂ (pr1 xyf₁)
r₁: f₁ = g₁
r₂: f₂ = g₂
f₁,, f₂,, p = g₁,, g₂,, q

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: ∑ (x : C₂) (y : C₁), V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
p, q: pr22 xyf₂ · lmap_e_arr P (pr12 xyf₂) f₁ =
pr22 xyf₁ · rmap_e_arr P f₂ (pr1 xyf₁)
f₁,, f₂,, p = f₁,, f₂,, q

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: ∑ (x : C₂) (y : C₁), V ⟦ I_{ V}, P x y ⟧
f₁: C₂ ⟦ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
f₂: C₁ ⟦ pr12 xyf₁, pr12 xyf₂ ⟧
p, q: pr22 xyf₂ · lmap_e_arr P (pr12 xyf₂) f₁ =
pr22 xyf₁ · rmap_e_arr P f₂ (pr1 xyf₁)
p = q

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  Definition make_graph_enriched_profunctor_mor
             {xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob}
             (h₁ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁
                   -->
                   graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂)
             (h₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁
                   -->
                   graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
             (p : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂ · lmap_e_arr P _ h₁
                  =
                  graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁ · rmap_e_arr P h₂ _)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_mor xyf₁ xyf₂
    := h₁ ,, h₂ ,, p.

  (** * 3. The enriched hom object *)
  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod
             (x₁ x₂ : C₁)
             (y₁ y₂ : C₂)
    : BinProduct _ (E₁ ⦃ x₁ , x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁ , y₂ ⦄)
    := benabou_cosmos_binproducts V (E₁ ⦃ x₁ , x₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁ , y₂ ⦄).

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_left
             {x₁ x₂ : C₁}
             {y₁ y₂ : C₂}
             (f : I_{V} --> P y₁ x₁)
             (g : I_{V} --> P y₂ x₂)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂
      -->
      P y₁ x₂
    := BinProductPr1 _ _
       · mon_rinvunitor _
       · (identity _ #⊗ f)
       · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_right
             {x₁ x₂ : C₁}
             {y₁ y₂ : C₂}
             (f : I_{V} --> P y₁ x₁)
             (g : I_{V} --> P y₂ x₂)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂
      -->
      P y₁ x₂
    := BinProductPr2 _ _
       · mon_rinvunitor _
       · (identity _ #⊗ g)
       · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
             {x₁ x₂ : C₁}
             {y₁ y₂ : C₂}
             (f : I_{V} --> P y₁ x₁)
             (g : I_{V} --> P y₂ x₂)
    : Equalizer
        (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_left f g)
        (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_right f g)
    := benabou_cosmos_equalizers
         V
         _ _
         (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_left f g)
         (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_right f g).

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
             {x₁ x₂ : C₁}
             {y₁ y₂ : C₂}
             (f : I_{V} --> P y₁ x₁)
             (g : I_{V} --> P y₂ x₂)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g
      -->
      E₁ ⦃ x₁ , x₂ ⦄
    := EqualizerArrow _ · BinProductPr1 _ _.

  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
             {x₁ x₂ : C₁}
             {y₁ y₂ : C₂}
             (f : I_{V} --> P y₁ x₁)
             (g : I_{V} --> P y₂ x₂)
    : graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g
      -->
      E₂ ⦃ y₁ , y₂ ⦄
    := EqualizerArrow _ · BinProductPr2 _ _.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· BinProductPr1 V
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
       x₂ y₁ y₂) · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· BinProductPr1 V
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
       x₂ y₁ y₂) · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· BinProductPr2 V
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
       x₂ y₁ y₂) · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (BinProductPr1 V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
         · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂))) =
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (BinProductPr2 V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂)
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
         · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂)))

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (BinProductPr1 V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂) · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂) =
EqualizerArrow
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (BinProductPr2 V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂) · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂)

    apply EqualizerEqAr.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
V ⟦ v, graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g ⟧

r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
V ⟦ v,
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂ y₁
  y₂ ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
?h · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_left f g =
?h
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_right f g

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
V ⟦ v,
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂ y₁
  y₂ ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow _ _ l r).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
BinProductArrow V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂
     y₁ y₂) l r
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_left f g =
BinProductArrow V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂
     y₁ y₂) l r
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_right f g
 abstract
        (unfold graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_left ;
         unfold graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_right ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         rewrite BinProductPr1Commutes ;
         rewrite BinProductPr2Commutes ;
         exact p).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor v l r p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g = l

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f

· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
EqualizerIn
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g) v
  (BinProductArrow V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂) l r)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_subproof
     x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ f g v l r p)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g = l

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁

p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f

  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_subproof
     x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ f g v l r p)
· (EqualizerArrow
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
   · BinProductPr1 V
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod
          x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂)) = l

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

EqualizerIn

        x₂ y₁ y₂) l r)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_subproof
     x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ f g v l r p)
· EqualizerArrow
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· BinProductPr1 V

       x₂ y₁ y₂) = l

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧

p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
BinProductArrow V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂
     y₁ y₂) l r
· BinProductPr1 V
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
       x₂ y₁ y₂) = l

    apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor v l r p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g = r

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor v l r p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g = r

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
EqualizerIn
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g) v
  (BinProductArrow V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂) l r)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_subproof
     x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ f g v l r p)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g = r

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
EqualizerIn
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g) v
  (BinProductArrow V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂) l r)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_subproof
     x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ f g v l r p)
· (EqualizerArrow
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
   · BinProductPr2 V
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod
          x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂)) = r

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
EqualizerIn
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g) v
  (BinProductArrow V
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
        x₂ y₁ y₂) l r)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_subproof
     x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ f g v l r p)
· EqualizerArrow
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· BinProductPr2 V
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
       x₂ y₁ y₂) = r

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
l: V ⟦ v, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
r: V ⟦ v, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
p: l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
BinProductArrow V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁ x₂
     y₁ y₂) l r
· BinProductPr2 V
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod x₁
       x₂ y₁ y₂) = r

    apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
v: V
h₁, h₂: V ⟦ v,
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g ⟧
p: h₁
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g =
h₂
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
q: h₁
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g =
h₂
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
h₁ = h₂

V: benabou_cosmos

y₁, y₂: C₂

g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g ⟧

· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g =
h₂
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
q: h₁
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g =
h₂
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g

· (EqualizerArrow
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
   · BinProductPr2 V
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod
          x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂)) =
h₂
· (EqualizerArrow
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
   · BinProductPr2 V
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_prod
          x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂))

      exact q.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. Operations for the enrichment *)
  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f f ⟧

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f f ⟧

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄ ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄ ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
?l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y x x =
?r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) #⊗ f · lmap_e P y y x

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄ ⟧
 apply enriched_id.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄ ⟧
 apply enriched_id.
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
enriched_id E₁ x · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x, x ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y x x =
enriched_id E₂ y · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y, y ⦄) #⊗ f · lmap_e P y y x
 abstract
        (rewrite !tensor_rinvunitor ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         rewrite <- !tensor_split' ;
         rewrite !(tensor_split (enriched_id _ _) f) ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite rmap_e_id ;
         rewrite lmap_e_id ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_id f
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f f =
enriched_id E₁ x

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_id f
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f f =
enriched_id E₁ x

    apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_pr1.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_id f
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f f =
enriched_id E₂ y

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x: C₁
y: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y x ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_id f
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f f =
enriched_id E₂ y

    apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_pr2.
  Qed.

  Section Composition.
    Context {x₁ x₂ x₃ : C₁}
            {y₁ y₂ y₃ : C₂}
            (f : I_{V} --> P y₁ x₁)
            (g : I_{V} --> P y₂ x₂)
            (h : I_{V} --> P y₃ x₃).

    Let l : graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
            ⊗
            graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g
            -->
            E₁ ⦃ x₁ , x₃ ⦄
      := graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 _ _
         #⊗
         graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 _ _
         · enriched_comp _ _ _ _.

    Let r : graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
            ⊗
            graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g
            -->
            E₂ ⦃ y₁ , y₃ ⦄
      := graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 _ _
         #⊗
         graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 _ _
         · enriched_comp _ _ _ _.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₃ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ f
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
· rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ f
· (enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃ #⊗ identity (P y₁ x₁)
   · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₃) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)) #⊗ f
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     (P y₁ x₁)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ f
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ f
      · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) (P y₁ x₁)
         · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

V: benabou_cosmos

g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
· rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.

· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
      · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃)) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
   · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃) = ?t2

#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)

· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
         · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃)))) =
?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
      · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
         · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
· rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃ = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
· rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
      · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃)) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂
      · rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃)) = ?b

        apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_eq.

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
· rmap_e P y₁ x₂ x₃ = ?t2

        apply lmap_e_rmap_e'.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃ =
?b

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
       (P y₃ x₃)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ h
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₃ x₃)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ h
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₃ x₃)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
      #⊗ h
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)

         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
?b

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V

  #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)

(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))

  #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)

#⊗ h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃

r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ h
· ((identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₃ x₃)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
         · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     (P y₃ x₃)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧

l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
#⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
  (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₃ x₃)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₃ x₃)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ h
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₃ x₃)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
?b

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ h
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        (P y₃ x₃)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
            #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
      · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2
