C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ h)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ h
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
   · (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
      #⊗ h
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (P y₃ x₃)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
                #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
            · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
               · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))))) = ?t2

l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V

E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ h

         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
             #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))

            #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)))) =
?t2

· (identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)) #⊗ h
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)

             #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)))) =
?b

(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
#⊗ h

    (P y₃ x₃)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))

  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))

E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
                #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
            · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
               · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))))) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) I_{ V}
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
             #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)))) =
?t2

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧

⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
               #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
                #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
            · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃
               · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃))))) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧

l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
             #⊗ identity (P y₃ x₃))
         · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
            #⊗ lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃ · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)))) =
?t2

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?t2 =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₂, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₂ x₃

        apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_eq.

  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g
         h · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g
       · rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃) · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
   · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
  #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
      · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g
      · rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃) · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ rmap_e P y₂ x₂ x₃
· lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₃

C₁, C₂: category

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g =
?y'

        apply tensor_split'.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)

      
V: benabou_cosmos

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)

#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) = ?b

    · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
      · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f
         g
       · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂)))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
         #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g))))

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
    · (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
       · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)))

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g))
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂))) =
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)))

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   · (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)

   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
      #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g))

y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂)))) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        (P y₂ x₂)
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
         · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
             (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂)))) = ?b

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V

⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     (P y₂ x₂)
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂))) = ?t2

x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) = ?t2

mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)) #⊗ g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) = ?t2

   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
          (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (P y₂ x₂))) = ?t2

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ g
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       (P y₂ x₂)) = ?t2

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄))
#⊗ g
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (P y₂ x₂)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) = ?t2

l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h

· identity ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)) #⊗ g
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) = ?t2

   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
(identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄))
#⊗ g
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    (P y₂ x₂) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V}
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ g)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V} =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V} = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V} = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
       (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
       I_{ V})
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    I_{ V} = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
               · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V}
                  · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                      (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) I_{ V})))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · (identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
               #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
                    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
               · identity
                   ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
                    ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}))))))) =
?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        I_{ V}
      · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
           ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
         · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
              (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
            · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
              #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
                   (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄))))) = ?b

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
· (mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     I_{ V}
   · (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
        ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
      · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
           (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
         · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
           #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V}
                (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)))) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
    I_{ V}
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
  ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
     ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
   · mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
       (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    ((E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V})
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
        (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
      · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
        #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄))) =
sym_mon_braiding V (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
     (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧

#⊗ identity (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) I_{ V}
    (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)
    · sym_mon_braiding V I_{ V} (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄) =
identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₂, x₃ ⦄)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f h ⟧

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
?l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₃ =
?r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁

h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h

E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h

· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V

  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
 exact l.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
 exact r.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, x₃: C₁
y₁, y₂, y₃: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
h: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₃ x₃ ⟧
l:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g
· enriched_comp E₁ x₁ x₂ x₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄ ⟧
r:= graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 g h
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g
· enriched_comp E₂ y₁ y₂ y₃: V
⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom g h
  ⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g,
E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₃ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₃ =
r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄) #⊗ h · lmap_e P y₃ y₁ x₃
 exact graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp_eq.
    Defined.

E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₃ ⦄ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f h = l

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f h = l

      apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_pr1.
    Qed.

p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom f g ⟧

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧

hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
?l · mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
?r · mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (enriched_from_arr E₁ hx).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄ ⟧
 exact (enriched_from_arr E₂ hy).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
enriched_from_arr E₁ hx
· mon_rinvunitor (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₁ ⦃ x₁, x₂ ⦄) #⊗ f · rmap_e P y₁ x₁ x₂ =
enriched_from_arr E₂ hy
· mon_rinvunitor (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
· identity (E₂ ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄) #⊗ g · lmap_e P y₂ y₁ x₂
 abstract
        (rewrite !tensor_rinvunitor ;
         rewrite !assoc' ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite !assoc ;
         rewrite <- !tensor_split' ;
         rewrite (tensor_split (enriched_from_arr _ _) f) ;
         rewrite (tensor_split (enriched_from_arr _ _) g) ;
         unfold lmap_e_arr, rmap_e_arr in p ;
         rewrite !assoc in p ;
         rewrite !tensor_linvunitor in p ;
         pose proof (maponpaths (λ z, mon_lunitor _ · z) p) as q ;
         cbn in q ;
         rewrite !assoc in q ;
         rewrite !mon_lunitor_linvunitor in q ;
         rewrite !id_left in q ;
         exact (!q)).
  Defined.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g =
enriched_from_arr E₁ hx

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 f g =
enriched_from_arr E₁ hx

    apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_pr1.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧

hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g =
enriched_from_arr E₂ hy

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y₁, y₂: C₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₁ x₁ ⟧
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, P y₂ x₂ ⟧
hx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: C₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
p: g · lmap_e_arr P x₂ hy = f · rmap_e_arr P hx y₁
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr p
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 f g =
enriched_from_arr E₂ hy

    apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_mor_pr2.
  Qed.

  Section ToArr.
    Context {xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob}
            (h : I_{V}
                 -->
                 graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
                   (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
                   (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)).

    Let k₁ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁
             -->
             graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂
      := enriched_to_arr _ (h · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 _ _).

    Let k₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁
             -->
             graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂
      := enriched_to_arr _ (h · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 _ _).

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
k₂:= enriched_to_arr E₁
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₁ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    k₁ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e_arr P k₂
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
