h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
k₂:= enriched_to_arr E₁
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₁ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    k₁ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e_arr P k₂
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
k₂:= enriched_to_arr E₁
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₁ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    (enriched_to_arr E₂
       (h
        · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
            (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
            (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂))) =

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧

· ((h

        (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂))
   #⊗ identity I_{ V}

     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) = ?y'

   graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
· (identity
     (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
      graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
   · rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)) =
mon_rinvunitor
  (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
   graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
· (identity
     (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
      graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
   · rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
k₂:= enriched_to_arr E₁
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₁ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⟧
mon_rinvunitor
  (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
   graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
· identity
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
     graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂) =
mon_rinvunitor
  (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
   graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
· identity
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
     graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
k₂:= enriched_to_arr E₁
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₁ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    ?h₁ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e_arr P ?h₂
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)

 exact k₁.

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor_ob
h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂) ⟧
k₁:= enriched_to_arr E₂
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₂ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₂ ⟧
k₂:= enriched_to_arr E₁
  (h
   · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂)): C₁ ⟦ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₁,
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₂
· lmap_e_arr P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 xyf₂)
    k₁ =
graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁
· rmap_e_arr P k₂
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 xyf₁)
 exact graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_to_arr_eq.
    Defined.
  End ToArr.

   (pr22 xyf₂)) xyf₁ xyf₃ ⟧

      exact (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃)).

xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
h: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₁, xyf₂ ⟧
V ⟦ I_{ V},

 graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 xyf₁)
   (pr22 xyf₂)) xyf₁ xyf₂ ⟧

      exact (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr (pr22 h)).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ _ : ∏ x y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
       graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧
       → V ⟦ I_{ V},
         (λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
            (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂)) x y ⟧,
 ∏ x y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
 V ⟦ I_{ V},
 (λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 xyf₁)
    (pr22 xyf₂)) x y ⟧
 → graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (λ (xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor)
   (h : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₁, xyf₂ ⟧),
   graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
     (pr22 h))
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
h: V ⟦ I_{ V},
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
  (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₁, xyf₂ ⟧

      exact (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_to_arr h).
  Defined.

  (** * 5. Laws for the enrichment *)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enrichment_laws
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
mon_lunitor
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  y
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x y y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
mon_runitor
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x x y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ w x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor,
enriched_comp
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z
     ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data w y z
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x y : graph_enriched_profunctor)
(f : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_to_arr
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  (enriched_from_arr
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data f) = f
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x y : graph_enriched_profunctor)
(f : V ⟦ I_{ V},
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y
     ⦄ ⟧),
enriched_from_arr
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  (enriched_to_arr
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data f) = f
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x : graph_enriched_profunctor,
enriched_to_arr
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  (enriched_id
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x) =
identity x
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor)
(f : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x y z)

xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_lunitor
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) =
enriched_id E₂ (pr1 xyf₂)
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂) (pr1 xyf₂)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
mon_runitor
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_id
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x x y

  (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 xyf₁)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂)

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_runitor
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
  (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 xyf₁, pr1 xyf₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_id E₂ (pr1 xyf₁)
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ w x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor,
enriched_comp
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x y z
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x
      ⦄)
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data w x z =
mon_lassociator
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data ⦃ y, z
     ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_comp
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data w x y
· enriched_comp
    graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data w y z

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 xyf₂)
  (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
    (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₄) =
mon_lassociator
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
· identity
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
       (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
       (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
    (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)

· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp

· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
    (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
    (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₄)

   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂) (pr1 xyf₄)) =
?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂, xyf₃, xyf₄: graph_enriched_profunctor

mon_lassociator
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
     (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
· (identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄))
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
        (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) 
        (pr22 xyf₃)
   · (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
        (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₃) 
        (pr22 xyf₄)
      · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
          (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₄)))

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
  (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃)
    #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂)
    · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂)
        (pr1 xyf₃)) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
  (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp
      (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃)
    · graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₃))

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
xyf₁, xyf₂, xyf₃, xyf₄: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
  (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃)
    #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂)
    · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂)
        (pr1 xyf₃)) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
  (pr22 xyf₃) (pr22 xyf₄)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 xyf₂) (pr22 xyf₃)
    #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂)
    · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 xyf₁) (pr1 xyf₂)
        (pr1 xyf₃))

        apply idpath.

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ (x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor)
(f : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ y, z ⟧),
f · g =
enriched_to_arr
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data g
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data f
   · enriched_comp
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data x y z)

h₂: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₂, xyf₃ ⟧
h₁ · h₂ =
enriched_to_arr
  graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data h₂
     #⊗ enriched_from_arr
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data h₁
   · enriched_comp
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data xyf₁
       xyf₂ xyf₃)

h₂: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₂, xyf₃ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1 (h₁ · h₂) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr1
  (enriched_to_arr
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
     (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data h₂
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr
             graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data

      · enriched_comp
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
          xyf₁ xyf₂ xyf₃))

h₂: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₂, xyf₃ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2 (h₁ · h₂) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_mor_pr2
  (enriched_to_arr
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
     (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data h₂
        #⊗ enriched_from_arr
             graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
             h₁
      · enriched_comp
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_data
          xyf₁ xyf₂ xyf₃))

h₂: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₂, xyf₃ ⟧
enriched_to_arr E₁
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
        (pr22 h₂)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
           (pr22 h₁)
      · (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
           (pr22 xyf₂)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₃)
         #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
              (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
              (pr22 xyf₂)
         · enriched_comp E₁ (pr12 xyf₁) (pr12 xyf₂)
             (pr12 xyf₃)))) = ?b

E₂: enrichment C₂ V

h₁: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₁, xyf₂ ⟧
h₂: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₂, xyf₃ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
  (pr22 h₂)
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
     (pr22 h₁)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
     (pr22 xyf₂)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₃)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
        (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₁)
        (pr22 xyf₂)
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr12 xyf₁) (pr12 xyf₂)
       (pr12 xyf₃)) = ?t2

h₂: graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ xyf₂, xyf₃ ⟧
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
  (pr22 h₂)
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr
     (pr22 h₁)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
    (pr22 xyf₂)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor xyf₃)

?t2

   · (enriched_from_arr E₁ (pr12 h₂)

      · enriched_comp E₁ (pr12 xyf₁) (pr12 xyf₂)

      · enriched_comp E₁ (pr12 xyf₁) (pr12 xyf₂)

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** * 7. The first projection *)
  Definition graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1
    : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟶ C₂
    := twosided_disp_category_pr1 _.

∏ x : graph_enriched_profunctor,
enriched_id graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment x
· ?pr1 x x =

∏ x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor,
enriched_comp graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment x y
  z · ?pr1 x z =
?pr1 y z #⊗ ?pr1 x y
· enriched_comp E₂ (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 y)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 z)
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ _ : ∏ x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor,
       enriched_comp
         graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment x y z
       · ?pr1 x z =
       ?pr1 y z #⊗ ?pr1 x y
       · enriched_comp E₂
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 x)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 y)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 z),
 ∏ (x y : graph_enriched_profunctor)
 (f : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 enriched_from_arr E₂
   (# graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 f) =
 enriched_from_arr
   graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment f · ?pr1 x y)
  ?pr11

· enriched_comp E₂ (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 y)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 z)
 abstract
        (intros xyf₁ xyf₂ xyf₃ ; cbn ;

            x y
       · enriched_comp E₂
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 x)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 y)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 z),
 ∏ (x y : graph_enriched_profunctor)
 (f : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧),

   (# graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1 f) =

   graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment f
 · ((λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2

    :
    functor_enrichment_data
      graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1
      graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₂) x y)
  graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment_subproof0
 abstract
        (intros xyf₁ xyf₂ h ; cbn ;
         rewrite graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr_pr2 ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

 functor_enrichment_data graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2
   graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₁) y z
#⊗ ((λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
    :
    functor_enrichment_data
      graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2
      graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₁) x y
· enriched_comp E₁ (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 y)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 z)
 abstract
        (intros xyf₁ xyf₂ xyf₃ ; cbn ;
         apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp_pr1).
    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
(λ _ : ∏ x y z : graph_enriched_profunctor,
       enriched_comp
         graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment x y z
       · ((λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
           graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
             (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
          :
          functor_enrichment_data
            graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2
            graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₁) x
           z =
       ((λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
           (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
        :
        functor_enrichment_data
          graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2
          graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₁) y z
       #⊗ ((λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
            graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
              (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
           :
           functor_enrichment_data
             graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2
             graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₁)
            x y
       · enriched_comp E₁
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 x)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 y)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 z),
 ∏ (x y : graph_enriched_profunctor)
 (f : graph_enriched_profunctor ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 enriched_from_arr E₁
   (# graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2 f) =
 enriched_from_arr
   graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment f
 · ((λ xyf₁ xyf₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
       (pr22 xyf₁) (pr22 xyf₂))
    :
    functor_enrichment_data
      graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2
      graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment E₁) x y)
  graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment_subproof0
 abstract
        (intros xyf₁ xyf₂ h ; cbn ;
         rewrite graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_from_arr_pr1 ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (** * 9. The square of the graph *)
  Definition enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data
    : enriched_profunctor_transformation_data
        (identity_enriched_profunctor graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment)
        (precomp_enriched_profunctor
           graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment
           graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment
           P)
    := λ x y,
       graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 _ _
       · mon_rinvunitor _
       · (identity _ #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y)
       · lmap_e P _ _ _.

  Arguments enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data /.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 (pr22 x)
  (pr22 y)
· mon_rinvunitor
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y ⦄)
· identity
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
· rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y)

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 (pr22 x)
  (pr22 y)
· mon_rinvunitor
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y ⦄)
· identity
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
· rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y)

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 (pr22 x)
  (pr22 y)
· mon_rinvunitor
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y ⦄)
· identity
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
· rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y) =
enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y

    apply graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_eq.
  Qed.

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data

  
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
enriched_profunctor_transformation_laws
  enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment P) x₁
    x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (identity_enriched_profunctor
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment) x₁ x₂ y
· enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x₂ y
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment P) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (identity_enriched_profunctor
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment) x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y₂

    
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x₁ x₂ y : graph_enriched_profunctor,
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment ⦃ x₂, x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x₁ y
· lmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment P) x₁
    x₂ y =
lmap_e
  (identity_enriched_profunctor
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment) x₁ x₂ y
· enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x₂ y
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    · identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
    · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P (pr1 x₁) (pr12 y))
   · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x₂)
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₂) (pr22 y)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
   · identity
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
   · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (pr1 x₂) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    · identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
    · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P (pr1 x₁) (pr12 y))
   · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)) = ?b
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
?b =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x₂)
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₂) (pr22 y)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
   · identity
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
   · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (pr1 x₂) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))

x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    · identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
    · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
   #⊗ identity (P (pr1 x₁) (pr12 y))
   · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)) = ?b

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    · identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
    · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
  #⊗ identity (P (pr1 x₁) (pr12 y))
· lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y) = ?b

x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
      (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    · identity

x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
      · mon_rinvunitor
          (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
           graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
      · identity
          (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,

        #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
      · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr1 x₁)
          (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y) = ?b

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
       · mon_rinvunitor
           (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
            graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
       · identity
           (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
            graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
         #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr1 x₁)
          (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y) = ?b

graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
       · (mon_rinvunitor
            (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
             graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
          · identity
              (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
               graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
            #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
           (pr1 x₁)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
      · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y))) = ?b

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
#⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
     (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
· lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   ⊗ ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
       ⦄)
      ⊗ P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
   · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V

P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
   · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
      ⦄)
     (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
   · (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
           (pr1 x₁)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
      · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y))) = ?t2

E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
        (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
   · lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)) = ?t2

  (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
?t2 =
mon_lassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (pr1 x₁) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)
· lmap_e P (pr1 x₁) (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)

        apply lmap_e_comp.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
       · (mon_rinvunitor
            (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
             graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
          · identity
              (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
               graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
            #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
        (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
      · ((sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
            (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
             graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
          · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁)
              (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y))
         #⊗ identity
              (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
                 (pr12 y))
         · lmap_e P
             (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
             (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y)))) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x₂)
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₂) (pr22 y)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
   · identity
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
   · lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (pr1 x₂) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))

#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
      · mon_rinvunitor
          (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
           graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
      · identity
          (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
           graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
        #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y)
· mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
    (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
      ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y))
  #⊗ identity
       (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr12 y))
· lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
    (pr1 x₂) (pr12 y) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x₂)
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 x₂) (pr22 y)
· mon_rinvunitor
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
· identity
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
· lmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
    (pr1 x₂) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y)

· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)

  (pr22 x₁)

     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2

  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))

        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
         (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
       · mon_rinvunitor
           (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
            graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄) I_{ V}) =
?y'

#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
   · identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     #⊗ mon_rinvunitor
          (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,

   · mon_rassociator (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)

· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
        ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
           graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
      ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y))
  #⊗ identity
       (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr12 y)) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x₂)
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 x₂) (pr22 y)
· mon_rinvunitor
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
· identity
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y

     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))

· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
      ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y))
  #⊗ identity
       (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr12 y))

   · identity
       (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y) = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_rinvunitor
  ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁) (pr1 y)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y = ?t2

        
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
mon_rinvunitor
  ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
· (identity
     ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁) (pr1 y)
     #⊗ identity
          (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
             (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.

C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
     (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
   · (mon_rinvunitor
        ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄)
         ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
      · (identity
           ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄)
            ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
         #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
         · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁) (pr1 y)
           #⊗ identity
                (P
                   (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
                   (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 y))))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
        ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
           graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
· (sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
      ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y))
  #⊗ identity
       (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr12 y))

     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
· mon_rinvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y

· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)

        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
· (identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity
        (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
         graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)

· enriched_comp E₂ (pr1 x₂) (pr1 x₁)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
  #⊗ identity
       (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y)
          (pr12 y))

        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)

              ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
           #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y))) =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
· mon_rinvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x₁, x₂, y: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2 (pr22 x₂)
  (pr22 x₁)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y))
· identity (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· mon_rinvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
     ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁,
        graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄))
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)
    (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y ⦄)
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 y
      ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y =
sym_mon_braiding V
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₂)
     (pr22 x₁))
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 x₁)
     (pr22 y))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
    (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr2
       (pr22 x₂) (pr22 x₁)
· mon_rinvunitor
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
· identity
    ((E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₁, pr1 y ⦄) ⊗ (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor y

     (pr22 x₁) (pr22 y)
· sym_mon_braiding V (E₂ ⦃ pr1 x₂, pr1 x₁ ⦄)

V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
∏ x y₁ y₂ : graph_enriched_profunctor,
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment P) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (identity_enriched_profunctor
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment) x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y₂
 
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment ⦃ y₁, y₂ ⦄)
#⊗ enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y₁
· rmap_e
    (precomp_enriched_profunctor
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr2_enrichment
       graph_enriched_profunctor_pr1_enrichment P) x
    y₁ y₂ =
rmap_e
  (identity_enriched_profunctor
     graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment) x y₁ y₂
· enriched_profunctor_graph_square_data x y₂

      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom (pr22 y₁)
     (pr22 y₂))
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
      (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
         pr12 y₁ ⦄)
    · identity
        (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
         pr12 y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
    · rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
        (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₁))
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
     (pr22 y₁) (pr22 y₂)
   #⊗ identity (P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁))
   · rmap_e P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂)) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x)
  (pr22 y₁) (pr22 y₂)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
     (pr22 x) (pr22 y₂)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
        pr12 y₂ ⦄)
   · identity
       (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
        pr12 y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
   · rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₂))

         pr12 y₁ ⦄)
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
    · rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
        (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₁))
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
    (pr22 y₁) (pr22 y₂)
  #⊗ identity (P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁))
· rmap_e P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂) = ?b

  (pr22 y₂)
#⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
      (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁)
    · mon_rinvunitor
        (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
         pr12 y₁ ⦄)

        (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,

· rmap_e P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂) = ?b

        (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁))

x, y₁, y₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
identity
  ((E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
   ⊗ ((E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
       pr12 y₁ ⦄)
      ⊗ P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
          (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x)))

  (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y₁ ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x))
· mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y₁
     ⦄)
    (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)

   · rmap_e P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂)) = ?t2

x, y₁, y₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
?t2 =
mon_lassociator (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
  (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y₁ ⦄)
  (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x))
· identity (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
  #⊗ rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₁)
· rmap_e P (pr1 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂)

        apply rmap_e_comp.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 (pr22 y₁)
  (pr22 y₂)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
         (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁)
       · (mon_rinvunitor
            (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
             pr12 y₁ ⦄)
          · identity
              (E₁
               ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
               pr12 y₁ ⦄)
            #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x))
   · (mon_rassociator (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
        (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
         pr12 y₁ ⦄)
        (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x))
      · (enriched_comp E₁
           (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x)
           (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂)
         #⊗ identity
              (P (pr1 x)
                 (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x))
         · rmap_e P (pr1 x)
             (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x)
             (pr12 y₂)))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x)
  (pr22 y₁) (pr22 y₂)
· (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
     (pr22 x) (pr22 y₂)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
        pr12 y₂ ⦄)
   · identity
       (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
        pr12 y₂ ⦄)
     #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
   · rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
       (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₂))

· enriched_comp E₁

    (pr12 y₂)
  #⊗ identity

· rmap_e P (pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₂) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_comp (pr22 x)
  (pr22 y₁) (pr22 y₂)
· graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
    (pr22 x) (pr22 y₂)
· mon_rinvunitor
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y₂
     ⦄)
· identity
    (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x, pr12 y₂

· rmap_e P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₂)

   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
   · enriched_comp E₁ (pr12 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂)
     #⊗ identity
          (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
             (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x))) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
V: benabou_cosmos
C₁, C₂: category
E₁: enrichment C₁ V
E₂: enrichment C₂ V
P: enriched_profunctor E₁ E₂
x, y₁, y₂: graph_enriched_profunctor
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 (pr22 y₁)
  (pr22 y₂)
#⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
     (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁)
· (mon_rinvunitor
     ((E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
      ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ pr12 x, pr12 y₁ ⦄))
   · (identity
        ((E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
         ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ pr12 x, pr12 y₁ ⦄))
      #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
      · enriched_comp E₁ (pr12 x) (pr12 y₁) (pr12 y₂)
        #⊗ identity
             (P (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr1 x)
                (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x)))) =
graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1 (pr22 y₁)
  (pr22 y₂)
#⊗ identity
     (graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom
        (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_enrichment_hom_pr1
        (pr22 x) (pr22 y₁)
   · mon_rinvunitor
       ((E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
        ⊗ (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
           pr12 y₁ ⦄)))
· (identity (E₁ ⦃ pr12 y₁, pr12 y₂ ⦄)
   #⊗ identity
        (E₁ ⦃ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x,
         pr12 y₁ ⦄))
  #⊗ graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_mor x
· enriched_comp E₁
    (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x) (pr12 y₁)
    (pr12 y₂)
  #⊗ identity
       (P (pr1 x) (graph_enriched_profunctor_ob_pr2 x))
